programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Witnessing her reservations about Abigail's plans for the hen's party later, Cash tells Eden he's glad Tane's organising his buck's.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Wandering through the Bay, Sonny admits to Remi he's disappointed the buck's party isn't going to be at the whisky bar any more.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Will Alf accept help from his friends? Tane's loved ones cling to hope. Sonny's feeling sidelined. David wishes he did better.

programme.title: Sean's Kitchen
programme.desc: Follow Sean Connolly, one of Australia's most well-respected and celebrated chefs, in his bid to showcase outstanding South Australian produce in his new restaurant named Sean's Kitchen.

programme.title: Sean's Kitchen
programme.desc: Follow Sean Connolly, one of Australia's most well-respected and celebrated chefs, in his bid to showcase outstanding South Australian produce in his new restaurant named Sean's Kitchen.

programme.title: A Moveable Feast
programme.desc: Melbourne's king of breakfast radio 3AW's Ross Stevenson explores Altona and Werribee to find the best kept secrets, eating spots and things to do with his co-host Kate Stevenson.

programme.title: Animals Aboard With Dr. Harry
programme.desc: We hit the road to save man’s best friend. A teary farewell for a special needs pup. A race against time to move the world’s most dangerous bird. And two French bull dogs take a 4300km road trip.

programme.title: Behave Yourself
programme.desc: Darren McMullen presents a mix of quick-fire buzzer rounds, experiments and hidden camera stunts to celebrity panellists as they compete to reveal fascinating facts behind why we do the things we do.

programme.title: Puppy School
programme.desc: Dog Squad Puppy School Series 3 kicks off with mobility fluff balls on the loose, you have to be quick if you want to catch Police pup Uber, and we’ve got a snow dog!

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall trains a German shepherd anxious about her puppy, a bulldog that is always stealing food and faces a particular challenge with a picnic, and a boxer that is driving a wedge between its owners.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The death of an officer pulls Goren from his compassionate leave as the case is given top priority, but his relentless investigation brings out information which leads to catastrophic fallout.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: While Benson tries to help the young BX9 gang member who attacked her, Duarte reveals a shocking piece of evidence in the case. Fin is tasked with hiring new detectives for the Bronx SVU.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: As Benson and Carisi put a vengeful crime boss on trial, Fin tries to help a woman who was drugged and left for dead. Velasco takes drastic action to get information from a witness.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: A severe blizzard causes a city-wide blackout, adding to the obstacles the team must overcome in order to solve a murder case that could be linked to a potential viral outbreak.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Pairs of dismembered feet wash ashore after floods on the US-Canada border, some of which are research corpses. A pair of rare and expensive sneakers provide a lead to the murderer.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: When a beloved Paniolo (Hawaiian cowboy) is shot while out riding his horse, Jane and her team must gain the trust of the Paniolo community to help find the culprits and protect the Paniolo’s life.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: When a Japanese sailor is killed on American soil and evidence links the case to the previous murder of the victim's girlfriend back in Japan, NCIS must find the murderer before the wrong person is accused and the case triggers a diplomatic crisis. Also, Captain Milius makes a personal request to Tennant.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide To Divorce
programme.sub-title: Rule #188 - Mind Your Side Of The Pl
programme.desc: Abby joins Barbara for a night out on the town. Jo deals with the ramifications of Scott’s departure. While Phoebe and JD try to bond with her kids, Delia deals with her troublesome new client.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: Claudia Joy and Chandler try to help an army wife who is being threatened with deportation. Roxy figures out a way to cut construction costs and move forward with building the truck stop.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: Claudia Joy and Chandler continue on the case of an army wife being threatened with deportation. Pamela notices Finn and TJ have gotten close to Whit.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: Despite the sadness that she feels, Denise finds the strength to be there for Jeremy's friends when they need her most. Things are tense between Roxy and Trevor as she struggles to find a way to tell him about the truck stop.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: The team uncovers animal secrets, including turtles, while Guy goes undercover in a canine operation.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: Nathan explores solids, liquids, and gases, learning about states of matter from various experts.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A new game show for kids where knowledge meets strategy with hilarious, slimy fun.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.sub-title: Great Day Out, The S3 Ep: 31
programme.desc: Billy gets a taste of Moreton Bay. Luke meets some emerging artists. Laurel takes high tea with Aussie film royalty, while Jillian visits some seriously glam places to stay on the Gold Coast.

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: The ladies get their first taste of life out on the land and are in for the shock of their lives. A text will send shockwaves across the farms leading to sudden departures.

programme.title: My France With Manu
programme.desc: Manu returns to take us on another journey through his home country, exploring the streets of Paris - its delights, and even learning the cancan.

programme.title: My France With Manu
programme.desc: Manu is back in France, taking you to Pyrenees, the place where garlic meets chilli, where France meets Spain. Explore a land of medieval castles where knights battled and ladies hit their mark.

programme.title: My Ireland With Colin
programme.desc: Dublin-born chef, restaurateur and MKR judge Colin Fassnidge returns home to discover the changing face of food in Ireland, taking a tour of his childhood haunts and heading off on a culinary tour of some of Ireland's most beautiful food producing areas.

programme.title: The Greatest Aussie Caravan
programme.desc: Each week, four husband and wife teams will test their skills as they go head-to-head to see who has what it takes to design, refurbish and re-build The Greatest Aussie Caravan.

programme.title: Extended Family
programme.sub-title: The Consequences of Considering the Consequences
programme.desc: Hoping to confirm their compatibility, Julia and Trey ask Jim to give them pre-marital counselling, believing him to be the most knowledgeable guy for the job.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is worried about how Beverly will handle him going off to college, so he tries to get a dream job right in their hometown. Erica and Geoff flip-flop on deciding to find out the sex of their new baby.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: As Darlene grapples with a life-changing offer from Ben, an unexpected conversation with David turns her world even more upside-down.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: In the wake of Emilio's deportation, Jackie steps into the role of a paternal figure and creates a meticulous birth plan for Becky; but as the Conners know, nothing ever goes according to plan. Meanwhile, Darlene is tangled in a complex love triangle with David and Ben, and - like her mother - Harris is caught up in a problem of her own.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.sub-title: The Spotted Lamb Adopted By A Dalmat
programme.desc: One year-old Hero has been vomiting all day and his owners are worried he's been eating rocks from their backyard. Can Lisa help the naughty Labrador pass the rock or will he be forced into surgery?

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man allegedly threatens a woman's credit score, so he's reprimanded by Judge Judy in her court of law; the cost of a property survey is disputed by neighbors after issues involving trash and a dog comes into play during a case.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: It's Not My Fault You're a Bad Driver!/Tyrannical Roommate?!
programme.desc: A contractor is paid a sum of $20,000 to install a driveway that his client claims is unsatisfactory, because she allegedly can't turn her car around in it; a man claims he's afraid of his former roommate, who allegedly enforces demanding rules.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An abortion clinic doctor is murdered, and when Logan and Briscoe investigate, they begin to suspect members of a radical movement led by a former priest, who appears to have no sympathy for the man's fate. Starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Detectives Logan and Falacci investigate the murder of an obstetrician found posed in a ritualistic fashion, spread-eagled on an examination chair, and the clues lead them to the doctor's son. Crime drama, starring Chris Noth and Alicia Witt.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A car accident leads the detectives on a search for an ambulance driver who is abducting and raping female patients. Fin gives potential new recruit, Brooklyn's Detective Bruno, a tour of Manhattan SVU.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: The mythic Chupacabra appears to be the culprit behind the murder of a television show host, but theories are challenged after new evidence is found; a recovering alcoholic and former coworker attempts to make amends with the team.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: The remains of a maritime museum security guard are found after an attempted robbery, and Booth seeks out a former soldier with an uncanny gift to find the person behind the murder; Brennan puts the former soldier's skills to the test.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: When Tennant and NCIS are tasked with finding a kidnapped globe-trotting social media star, they find that she is not who her husband, or her followers, think she is. Also, the team is at odds with Whistler, who has an agenda of her own.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: When a Navy petty officer is murdered, Jane and the team investigate while protecting the victim's friend and colleague.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide To Divorce
programme.desc: Stuck on a trip with her son's baseball team, Abby searches for inspiration for her romance novel. The rest of the girlfriends try to escape their problems with a weekend getaway in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: The problems in Roxy and Trevor's marriage become even bigger when they start to affect his Army duties and Roxy turns to Denise for some advice.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: Claudia Joy is happy to have Emmalin and Michael back under the same roof, but it's clear to Claudia Joy that they both have something else on their minds.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: Emmalin's college issues and Michael's unclear career path put a strain on their relationship and Claudia Joy is forced to choose sides. Denise returns to work.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: A trip back in time to see a school day 150 years ago and the challenges of life back then.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: The team explores eco-friendly living, visits a green school in Bali, and Laura learns the history of Montague Island.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A new game show for kids where knowledge meets strategy with hilarious, slimy fun.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.sub-title: Great Day Out, The S3 Ep: 32
programme.desc: The Great Day Out is people, places and friendly faces; it is at the very heart of Queensland and special guest celebrities will invite you along on their Great Day Out.

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: It's fireworks at our farmer's first get-together as one of the Famer's speed-date ladies comes back for a second chance at love, and an anonymous message threatens to tear one farm apart.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: As Guthrie takes on a new position as the hospital chaplain, he considers having a risky surgery to treat his Parkinson’s. Also, the doctors treat patients who arrive at Angels from an apartment fire.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: After pulling a double shift, Mario risks his own life when he follows Willis to a construction site where two brothers are trapped on a crane 300 feet above the ground.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: The young girl Ariel bonded with a year ago when she lost her father, returns to Angels.
